notes: Part of the overnight Level 2 --top=10 production run (2026-04-08 → 2026-04-09 UTC). 12 of 13 target repos completed successfully; 1 repo (MihaiCristianCondrea/Smart-Cleaner-for-Android) failed silently due to a clone error — see SCANNER-INCIDENTS.md SI-005 (pending writeup). Across the 12 successful repos, 6,265 PRs were scanned (of 14,677 targeted), producing 2,126 gate findings of which approximately 100 were classified as high-confidence. Aggregate skip rate: 58% (strongly correlated with agent population — Devin-dominant repos skip at 80%+, Codex/Cursor-dominant repos skip at <10%). Known contamination in the raw finding counts: approximately 528 serialization findings and 87 a11y findings from MontrealAI/AGI-Alpha-Agent-v0 are scanner noise from SI-004 (predicate-generator misfiring on YAML files, and edit-content-mismatch mis-attributing single findings across many file paths); these will be filtered out of corrected aggregates once SI-004 is split and fixed. SI-003 (multi-commit PR file-creation false positives) also contaminates an estimated 10-20% of F9 findings on multi-commit-PR-heavy repos. Corrected conservative finding count after subtracting confirmed SI-004 noise: approximately 1,511 findings, with an unknown additional SI-003 noise floor. This summary is part of a raw batch commit — per-repo triage, shape promotion, and aggregate cross-repo analysis are pending operator review. Per-PR JSONLs remain Lenovo-local per the data-separate-knowledge-unified policy.
